verdicts.note: The dossier contains no tax position. 'Responsible, disciplined use of your tax dollars' and 'excessive spending' are spending-axis statements; no opposition to specific taxes or tax-cut proposal is documented anywhere. Deriving a taxes lean from spending rhetoric is indirect inference — low confidence.

'Addressing crime and homelessness' is directionless — the 'accountability frame' is the scorer's gloss, not the dossier's text. The only directional signal is self-reported, unnamed 'law enforcement leaders' endorsements in his own pamphlet. That is weak, indirect evidence; keep the lean only at low confidence.
